## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/Mpi_E_U4neczvz3ZCZVyPW7hfZbAXnDU?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content brief for upcoming week is set; focus on CMS comparisons with emphasis on use cases rather than features](https://fathom.video/share/Mpi_E_U4neczvz3ZCZVyPW7hfZbAXnDU?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [GrowthX to take over topic ideation; AI for web dev and LLM SEO are key focus areas](https://fathom.video/share/Mpi_E_U4neczvz3ZCZVyPW7hfZbAXnDU?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [Audit week next week: GrowthX pausing deliverables to optimize processes and transition to internal tool](https://fathom.video/share/Mpi_E_U4neczvz3ZCZVyPW7hfZbAXnDU?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)
  - [Traffic decrease noted; design-related blogs losing consistent traffic](https://fathom.video/share/Mpi_E_U4neczvz3ZCZVyPW7hfZbAXnDU?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)

## Topics

### Content Brief and Strategy

  - [No new calls found highly relevant; existing brief + Jacob's input sufficient](https://fathom.video/share/Mpi_E_U4neczvz3ZCZVyPW7hfZbAXnDU?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [CMS comparison articles to focus on use cases for Webstacks' target audience, not just features](https://fathom.video/share/Mpi_E_U4neczvz3ZCZVyPW7hfZbAXnDU?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [Jesse to share sales conversation recordings for context on client CMS considerations](https://fathom.video/share/Mpi_E_U4neczvz3ZCZVyPW7hfZbAXnDU?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Emphasis on visual editing, performance, and hosting platform compatibility](https://fathom.video/share/Mpi_E_U4neczvz3ZCZVyPW7hfZbAXnDU?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Topic Ideation and Thought Leadership

  - [GrowthX taking over topic ideation after this week](https://fathom.video/share/Mpi_E_U4neczvz3ZCZVyPW7hfZbAXnDU?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [Key focus areas: AI for web dev, vibe coding for growth marketing, content generation, LLM SEO](https://fathom.video/share/Mpi_E_U4neczvz3ZCZVyPW7hfZbAXnDU?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [Webstacks pro-vibe coding, especially for front-end dev; prioritizing speed](https://fathom.video/share/Mpi_E_U4neczvz3ZCZVyPW7hfZbAXnDU?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
  - [Jacob shared thought leadership ideas; Jesse to review and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/Mpi_E_U4neczvz3ZCZVyPW7hfZbAXnDU?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)

### Performance Analysis

  - [Looker Studio had GSC data issues; might switch to GA4 if problems persist](https://fathom.video/share/Mpi_E_U4neczvz3ZCZVyPW7hfZbAXnDU?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
  - [Week 22 saw traffic decrease; common pattern of growth followed by slight decline](https://fathom.video/share/Mpi_E_U4neczvz3ZCZVyPW7hfZbAXnDU?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
  - [Design-related blogs (press pages) from early year consistently losing traffic](https://fathom.video/share/Mpi_E_U4neczvz3ZCZVyPW7hfZbAXnDU?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Need to analyze HubSpot data for lead quality before refreshing content](https://fathom.video/share/Mpi_E_U4neczvz3ZCZVyPW7hfZbAXnDU?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Audit Week and Process Changes

  - [GrowthX pausing deliverables next week for internal audit and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/Mpi_E_U4neczvz3ZCZVyPW7hfZbAXnDU?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)
  - [Transitioning from AirOps to internal tool](https://fathom.video/share/Mpi_E_U4neczvz3ZCZVyPW7hfZbAXnDU?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
  - [Marcel conducting "listening tour"; Jesse meeting early following week](https://fathom.video/share/Mpi_E_U4neczvz3ZCZVyPW7hfZbAXnDU?tab=summary&timestamp=1026.0)

### Pipeline and Conversion Tracking

  - [Jesse seeking clarity on organic traffic impact on pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/Mpi_E_U4neczvz3ZCZVyPW7hfZbAXnDU?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
  - [Last year: \~1 quality pipeline opportunity/month from organic; this year more sporadic](https://fathom.video/share/Mpi_E_U4neczvz3ZCZVyPW7hfZbAXnDU?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)
  - [Need to investigate blog post to sales call conversion funnel](https://fathom.video/share/Mpi_E_U4neczvz3ZCZVyPW7hfZbAXnDU?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
  - [All sales/marketing data housed in HubSpot; includes social, email, outbound efforts](https://fathom.video/share/Mpi_E_U4neczvz3ZCZVyPW7hfZbAXnDU?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)

### Paid Search Impact

  - [Recent ramp-up in paid search likely impacting organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/Mpi_E_U4neczvz3ZCZVyPW7hfZbAXnDU?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)
  - [Potential keyword cannibalization between blog content and ad campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/Mpi_E_U4neczvz3ZCZVyPW7hfZbAXnDU?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)

  - [Jacob to assist with merging HubSpot data for pipeline impact analysis](https://fathom.video/share/Mpi_E_U4neczvz3ZCZVyPW7hfZbAXnDU?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)
